issues.description: WI-032 closes the raw payload surface for /admin/logs, EventLogTable, and CSV, but /api/spaces/[id]/admin/stats still returns recentActivity from prisma.spaceEventLog.findMany without select or DTO mapping. DashboardOverviewPage fetches this endpoint, so future sensitive SpaceEventLog.payload keys would still be delivered raw to the browser/network outside the new chokepoint.
issues.recommendation: Apply the same public DTO mapping to recentActivity, or select only the fields the overview uses and omit payload entirely. Add a regression test that any API returning SpaceEventLog rows cannot expose forbidden payload keys.
